name: pscale
description: Pscale is a CLI library for communicating with PlanetScale's API

subcommands.name: audit-log
subcommands.description: List audit logs

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List all audit logs of an organization

name: --api-token
options.description: The API token to use for authenticating against the PlanetScale API

name: --api-url
options.description: The base URL for the PlanetScale API. (default "https://api.planetscale.com/")

name: --format
-f
options.description: Show output in a specific format. Possible values: [human, json, csv] (default "human")

name: --service-token-name
options.description: The Service Token name for authenticating

subcommands.description: Login and logout via the PlanetScale API

subcommands.name: connect
subcommands.description: Create a secure connection to a database and branch for a local client

name: --execute
options.description: Run this command after successfully connecting to the database

name: --execute-env-url
options.description: Environment variable name that contains the exposed Database URL. (default "DATABASE_URL")

name: --execute-protocol
options.description: Protocol for the exposed URL (by default DATABASE_URL) value in execute (default "mysql2")

name: --host
options.description: Local host to bind and listen for connections (default "127.0.0.1")

name: --org
options.description: The organization for the current user

name: --port
options.description: Local port to bind and listen for connections (default "3306")

name: --remote-addr
options.description: PlanetScale Database remote network address. By default the remote address is populated automatically from the PlanetScale API

name: --api-token
options.description: The API token to use for authenticating against the PlanetScale API

options.description: Local address to bind and listen for connections. By default the proxy binds to 127.0.0.1 with a random port

options.description: Output director of the dump. By default the dump is stored to a folder in the current directory

options.description: Comma separated string of tables to dump. By default all tables are dumped
